title: BrokenKodiak's Sadness Meter
description: Man sad, man eat food, man no longer sad.
body: BrokenKodiak’s Sadness Meter is a Forge 1.16.5 mod that adds a sadness meter to the game. The sadness meter fills up over  the span of 2 hours. Once the meter fills all the way you die of sadness. To make the meter go down you have to eat food. And that is all, have fun!
